name: Which AI visibility fixes give the best return on investment?

mainEntity.name: Which AI visibility fixes give the best return on investment?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best value usually comes from optimizing pages that can influence revenue, not just traffic. If AI visibility improves on high-intent queries, it may increase branded search, direct visits, demo requests, or other conversions over time.
acceptedAnswer.description: High-intent pages usually deliver the best ROI because they affect revenue-focused queries.

description: High-intent pages usually deliver the best ROI because they affect revenue-focused queries.
